children.text: $625,000 to publish and distribute the Emergency Response Guidebook under section 5116(h)(3); and

children.heading: .—Hazardous Materials Training Grants
children.label: c .—Hazardous Materials Training Grants
children.text: From the Hazardous Materials Emergency Preparedness Fund established pursuant to section 5116(h), the Secretary may expend $5,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2022 through 2026 to carry out section 5107(e).

children.heading: .—Community Safety Grants
children.label: d .—Community Safety Grants
children.text: Of the amounts made available under subsection (a) to carry out this chapter, the Secretary shall withhold $4,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2022 through 2026 to carry out section 5107(i).

children.heading: .—Expenses
children.label: 1 .—Expenses
children.text: In addition to amounts otherwise made available to carry out this chapter, the Secretary may credit amounts received from a State, Indian tribe, or other public authority or private entity for expenses the Secretary incurs in providing training to the State, Indian tribe, authority or entity.

children.heading: .—Availability of amounts
children.label: 2 .—Availability of amounts
children.text: Amounts made available under this section shall remain available until expended.
